description: A vertical graphic. The upper portion is a photograph of two officers in dark windbreakers lettered POLICE HSI, each with a U.S. flag patch, escorting a handcuffed man in a light blue shirt away from the camera across a parking lot with cars and a seated officer. A dark navy panel below holds white text reading Criminals don't get second chances. They get handed to ICE.
notable_text: POLICE HSI; Criminals don't get second chances. They get handed to ICE.
